allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem apps\\api -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app.main import app; routes=[r for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r,'methods'\) and '/ui-labels' in r.path]; [print\(sorted\(r.methods\), r.path\) for r in routes]")
